utterances.speaker: Hoshi
utterances.text: Let me ask you something , how come when I call your computer support line , I have to wait an hour and a half ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_when I call your computer support line , I have to wait an hour and a half

utterances.speaker: Pete
utterances.text: I told you , we are adding new operators all the time . Could we concentrate on my training ?
